summary_en: Mandarake completed acquisition of 2,100 treasury shares via ToSTNeT-3 on May [date], concluding its announced buyback program.
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Treasury Stock Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3) and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Mandarake Inc. (2652, Tokyo Standard Market) announced the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program. The company purchased 2,100 shares of its common stock via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading mechanism) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The total acquisition amount was approximately ¥2.4 million. This acquisition concludes the buyback program authorized by the Board of Directors' resolution in May, which had set an upper limit of 2,100 shares with a maximum acquisition cost of ¥2.4 million. The stated rationale was to improve capital efficiency and implement flexible capital allocation policies. The acquisition method via ToSTNeT-3 enables trading outside regular trading hours on an electronic basis.
